description: This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.
current_state_bullets: **Codebase metrics:** ~118k production LoC across 181 files (incl. NEW `SeLe4n/Kernel/Concurrency/Locks/TicketLock.lean` from SM2.B + `rust/sele4n-hal/src/ticket_lock.rs` from SM2.B.16); ~23k test LoC across 31 suites (`tests/TicketLockSuite.lean` from SM2.B with 90+ surface anchors + 35 runtime assertions + 25+ decidable examples); 3,400+ theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom). Rust HAL: 613 host unit tests + 1 ignored (`sm1g3_cross_core_kprintln_stress` placeholder) (was 592 pre-SM2.B; +21 SM2.B.16 tests including panic-safety + cross-thread mutex stress + cross-thread FIFO observation) + 94 ABI conformance tests.

**Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION.md) — pre-1.0 readiness audit. WS-RC R0..R5 LANDED at v0.31.2; R6..R14 absorbed into WS-SM per the SM0.Q.1 absorption mapping in [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md §15`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md). Sub-portfolio plans archived to [`docs/dev_history/audits/`](../dev_history/audits/) per WS-SM SM0.Q.2.

**Active workstream:** **WS-SM IN FLIGHT** (v0.31.2 → v0.31.3 → v0.31.4 → v0.31.5 → v0.31.6 → v0.31.7 → v0.31.8 → v0.31.9 → v1.0.0). Unified workstream merging WS-RC's remaining R6..R14 phases with the SMP-specific SM-phases (SM0..SM9). **Phase SM0 (Foundations & honesty patches) COMPLETE** at v0.31.3; **SM1 (Rust HAL) CLOSED at v0.31.8** with all nine sub-phases LANDED (SM1.A through SM1.I; 61 total sub-tasks). **Phase SM2.A (Abstract memory model) LANDED at v0.31.9** — the foundation that SM2.B (TicketLock) and SM2.C (RwLock) release-acquire pairing proofs consume. **Phase SM2.B (Verified TicketLock spec + Rust impl) LANDED post-v0.31.9** on branch `claude/review-ticketlock-tasks-2ca8a` — all 16 sub-tasks: `SeLe4n/Kernel/Concurrency/Locks/TicketLock.lean` (~1830 LoC; zero `axioms`, zero `sorries`); abstract operational spec with 8-conjunct `wf` invariant (incl. the count-parity strengthening INV-T8 that closes a gap in the plan's 7-invariant form); 6 substantive theorems (`mutex`, wf-preservation aggregate, `fifo`, `bounded_wait` (`nextTicket ≤ serving + numCores`), `release_acquire_pairing` bridging to SM2.A, `reachability` via `KernelStep` inductive); determinism witnesses + closure-form aliases. Rust impl at `rust/sele4n-hal/src/ticket_lock.rs` (cache-line aligned `TicketLock` + RAII `TicketLockGuard`, 538 LoC including tests). 21 cargo unit tests including panic-safety + cross-thread mutex/FIFO stress; Lean test suite (`tests/TicketLockSuite.lean`, 458 LoC) with 90+ surface anchors + 35 runtime assertions in `lake exe ticket_lock_suite`. Plan: [`SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md). SM2 sub-plan: [`SMP_VERIFIED_LOCK_PRIMITIVES_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_VERIFIED_LOCK_PRIMITIVES_PLAN.md). **Items deferred past v1.0.0 with correctness impact: NONE.** Next phases: SM2.C (RwLock spec + Rust impl), SM2.D (FFI + integration), SM2.E (documentation) + SM3..SM9 → closure cut at v1.0.0.
**Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
**Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
**Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).
